source_text: what in the everloving fuck goes on at mclaren
current_zh: 永远热爱的他妈的 在McLaren发生了什么
suggested_zh: McLaren 到底在搞什么
notes: 粉丝口语，可意译，避免粗口直译过强

source_text: reminds me of last year when he decided 5mins after quali that his best shot at winning spa was attacking right at the start; he did it and he won. he knew track position was important today, he went for it, and he got it. i love when he's hungry for it, he was amazing today
current_zh: 让我想起去年他在夸利之后决定5mins时, 他赢得温泉的最好机会就是在开始攻击;他做到了,他赢了。 他知道赛道位置今天很重要, 他去了,他得到了它。 我喜欢他饥渴的时候 他今天很厉害
suggested_zh: 这让我想起去年排位后他很快判断：想赢 Spa，最好一发车就进攻；他做到了，也赢了。今天他知道赛道位置很关键，就直接去抢，也抢到了。我喜欢他这种有求胜欲的状态，今天太棒了。
notes: 长粉丝帖应自然意译

source_text: Q: "how significant was the opening lap and the moves you made there?" oscar: "reasonable, in terms of getting the pit priority i wanted. it's always the benefit of being the first car on the road for the team."
current_zh: Oscar:"合理,在获得我想要的坑优先级方面, 成为球队在路上的第一辆汽车总是有好处".
suggested_zh: 问：首圈和你当时的超车有多关键？Oscar：还挺关键，主要是拿到我想要的进站优先权。对车队来说，成为路上位置靠前的那台车总是有好处。
notes: pit priority 固定为进站优先权

source_text: "i'm looking forward to the challenge" oh he is HUNGRY
current_zh: "我期待着挑战" 哦,他是HUNGRY
suggested_zh: “我很期待这个挑战” 他的求胜欲真的上来了
notes: HUNGRY 在体育语境为求胜欲强

source_text: andrea stella praising oscar's race! "excellent strategy and tyre management. oscar drove a fantastic race."
current_zh: Andrea Stella 称赞奥斯卡的比赛! "出色的策略和轮胎管理. 奥斯卡驾驶了一场精彩的比赛。"
suggested_zh: Andrea Stella 称赞 Oscar 的比赛：“策略和轮胎管理都很出色。Oscar 跑了一场非常精彩的比赛。”
notes: drove a race 译为跑了一场比赛更自然

source_text: From P7 ➡️ P4 #McLarenF1 | #AustrianGP 🇦🇹
current_zh: 来自P7 #P4 #McLarenF1 #奥地利GP #
suggested_zh: 从 P7 追到 P4 #McLarenF1 | #AustrianGP
notes: 保留标签

source_text: NO FURTHER ACTION !!! p4 is secured

suggested_zh: 不再处罚，P4 保住了
notes: No further action 为赛会无进一步行动

source_text: HAPPY OSCAR ON THE RADIO 🥹🫶🏻 "that was a bit better than last race, nice! still got a bit of pace to make up but thanks for all the effort the last couple of weeks. pretty good evidence that it's paid off. thank you, let's do that every time, thank you!"
current_zh: 快乐的OSCAR在收音机上 "这是有点好 比上次比赛,不错! 仍然有一点速度来弥补,但是感谢 在过去的几个星期里所做的一切努力。 相当不错的证据 证明它得到了回报。 谢谢,我们每次都这样,谢谢!"
suggested_zh: 车队无线电里开心的 Oscar：“比上一场好多了，不错！还有一些速度要找回来，但谢谢大家过去几周的努力。这很好地证明努力有回报。谢谢，我们每次都这么干吧，谢谢！”
notes: TR 可翻成口语

source_text: Oscar's overtake on Charles
current_zh: 奥斯卡在查尔斯上!
suggested_zh: Oscar 对 Charles 的超车
notes: Charles 或 Leclerc 都可，保留英文且不影响理解即可

current_zh: 奥斯卡在开始的状态
suggested_zh: Oscar 起步阶段的超车
notes: start 在正赛语境为发车/起步

source_text: oscar and max before the national anthem
current_zh: 在国歌前,
suggested_zh: Oscar 和 Max 在国歌前
notes: 短图片说明，保留人名英文即可

source_text: Q: "did you expect red bull to be as fast as they were?" oscar: "no! not as fast. i thought they would be in the race with us and that would be the fight, but it definitely wasn't 😅"
current_zh: 问:"你期望红公牛像他们一样快吗?"奥斯卡:"不!没有快. 我以为他们会和我们一起参加比赛 那才是比赛 但绝对不是
suggested_zh: 问：你预料 Red Bull 会这么快吗？Oscar：“没有，没想到这么快。我原以为他们会和我们处在同一比赛节奏里，那会是主要对手，但结果显然不是。”
notes: 采访问答应自然意译；Red Bull 保留英文

source_text: Q: "do you think p4 was the maximum of the car today?" oscar: "definitely. mercedes & max were in a different league today. it was great to be able to beat both ferraris. very pleased overall and on a personal level i thought it was a strong race."
current_zh: 问:"你认为p4是今天汽车的最大值吗?"Oscar:"确定. Mercedes & amp; Max 今天的联赛不同。 能击败两个费拉里斯真是太好了 在个人层面,我认为这是一场激烈的比赛。
suggested_zh: 问：你觉得 P4 是今天赛车能达到的上限吗？Oscar：“是的。Mercedes 和 Max 今天在另一个级别。能击败两台 Ferrari 很好。总体非常满意，就个人表现而言，我觉得这是一场很强的比赛。”
notes: 处理 & entity；different league 译为另一个级别

source_text: Enjoyed that one
current_zh: 享受那个
suggested_zh: 这场跑得很享受
notes: Oscar 本人短帖，口语意译

source_text: oscar filmed a segment for dazn
current_zh: Oscar拍摄了一段 Dazn!
suggested_zh: Oscar 为 DAZN 拍了一段节目
notes: DAZN 保留英文

source_text: oscar's dap skills got a 7/10
current_zh: Oscar的Dap技巧有7/10: (
suggested_zh: Oscar 的击掌/打招呼动作得了 7/10
notes: dap 指击掌打招呼，可意译

source_text: andrea stella spoke about the work they put in to figure out oscar's struggles in barcelona and how it paid off! "oscar drove very well today. we invested in understanding a few things after barcelona and oscar delivered that."
current_zh: Andrea Stella谈到了他们为了找出Oscar在Barcelona的挣扎而投入的工作 以及它如何得到回报! "奥斯卡今天开车非常顺利. 在Barcelona和Oscar交付后, 我们投资理解一些事情。"
suggested_zh: Andrea Stella 谈到车队如何复盘 Oscar 在 Barcelona 的挣扎，以及这些工作如何得到回报：“Oscar 今天开得很好。Barcelona 之后我们投入精力理解了一些问题，而 Oscar 今天交出了回应。”
notes: 长引语自然化

source_text: "on a personal level i thought it was a really good race. barcelona was a big struggle, i had some things to learn. i feel like this weekend has been a massive improvement from that in a race that in some ways was similar. overall i'm very happy with today."
current_zh: "在个人层面,我认为这是 一个非常好的比赛。 Barcelona是一个大斗争, 我有一些事情要学习。 我觉得这个周末 已经是一个巨大的进步 在比赛中, 在某些方面是相似的。 今天我很高兴"
suggested_zh: “就个人表现来说，我觉得这是一场很好的比赛。Barcelona 对我来说很艰难，我有些东西要学习。这个周末在某些相似条件下，我觉得自己有了很大进步。总体来说，我对今天很满意。”
notes: Oscar 赛后长引语

source_text: Well done mate, that's a really phenomenal drive, great drive! Really good job Oscar, that's exactly what we were looking for. 🐝Yeah that was a bit better than last race, nice. Good job everybody, that was a tough afternoon, I've still got a bit of pace to make up but thanks guys for all the effort the last couple of weeks. I think that is pretty good evidence that it's paid off. So thank you, let's do that every time~Thank you~
current_zh: 做得好,伙计, 这是一个真正的惊人的驱动, 伟大的驱动! 奥斯卡干的不错,这正是我们要找的 是啊,这是有点好 比上次比赛,不错。 辛苦了,我还有一点时间弥补 但是感谢大家在过去几周里的努力 我认为这是相当好的证据 证明它得到了回报。 所以,谢谢你,让我们每次做 谢谢
suggested_zh: 车队无线电：工程师：“干得漂亮，这是一场非常出色的驾驶，正是我们想看到的。” Oscar：“是的，比上一场好多了。大家辛苦了，今天下午并不轻松，我还有一些速度要找回来，但谢谢大家过去几周的努力。这很好地证明努力有回报。谢谢，我们每次都这么干吧。”
notes: 用户反馈 badcase；TR 对话框语气

source_text: i was able to be happy for 0.5 seconds and here come the "fia" putting my joy on hold... RESOLVE THIS INVESTIGATION QUICKLY I BEG
current_zh: 我快乐了0.5秒,"Fia"来了,让我的快乐被搁置... 尽快完成这项调查
suggested_zh: 我才开心了 0.5 秒，FIA 就来了，把我的快乐暂停了……求求快点把调查处理完。
notes: 粉丝情绪帖，保留夸张语气

source_text: start p7, overtake norris at the start, overtake leclerc, keep hamilton behind, recover three places, deny the special helmet curse allegations, deny the bad race pace allegations, deny the tyre muncher allegations and call it a day
current_zh: 开始p7,开始取取诺里斯 在开始取取取克勒克,保持Hamilton落后,恢复了3个位置,否认了特殊的头盔诅咒指控,否认了赛跑节奏不好的指控,否认了轮胎杂货商的指控,并宣布一天结束
suggested_zh: P7 发车，起步超 Norris，再超 Leclerc，把 Hamilton 挡在身后，追回 3 个位置，顺手打破“特殊头盔诅咒”“正赛速度不行”“吃胎”的质疑，然后收工。
notes: 用户反馈 badcase；保留粉丝梗

source_text: really solid race today for P4! doing us proud as always ☺️ up to P4 in the drivers standings too 👀
current_zh: 今天P4的比赛很顺利!
suggested_zh: 今天 P4 完赛很扎实，一如既往让我们骄傲；车手积分榜也升到 P4 了。
notes: 粉丝总结

source_text: oscar has been called to the stewards for driving unnecessarily slowly during reconnaissance laps.
current_zh: Oscar因在侦察圈中驾驶不必要地缓慢而被召至服务员.
suggested_zh: Oscar 因侦察圈中“不必要地慢速驾驶”被干事传唤。
notes: 用户反馈 badcase；stewards 固定译为干事

source_text: p4 today also means oscar is now p4 in the driver standings with 80 points!
current_zh: 今天p4也意味着Oscar现在是p4,在车手站出80分!
suggested_zh: 今天 P4 完赛也意味着 Oscar 以 80 分升至车手积分榜第 4。
notes: 用户反馈 badcase

source_text: tom: "that's the chequered flag. great drive mate. that's a phenomenal drive to p4. that's what we were looking for." oscar: "well, that was a bit better than last week! thanks guys. lot of hard work done, more pace to find."
current_zh: 汤姆:"那是支票旗. 伟大的驱动伙伴。 奥斯卡:"好吧,那比上周好点了!" 谢谢 很多艰苦的工作, 更多的速度寻找。"
suggested_zh: 车队无线电：Tom：“方格旗了。开得很好，P4 这场非常出色，正是我们想看到的。” Oscar：“嗯，比上周好多了！谢谢大家。做了很多努力，还有速度要继续找。”
notes: 用户反馈 badcase；chequered flag 固定译为方格旗

source_text: FROM P7 TO P4 !!!! he said he understood what went wrong in barcelona and he showed it today: great pace, great tyre management, great overtakes. a race to be very proud of
current_zh: 从P7到P4! 他说他明白巴塞洛纳出了什么问题 他今天展示了这一点: 车速快,轮胎管理好,超负荷。 赛跑得非常骄傲
suggested_zh: 从 P7 到 P4！他说自己明白了 Barcelona 出了什么问题，今天也证明了这一点：速度好、轮胎管理好、超车漂亮。这是一场值得骄傲的比赛。
notes: 粉丝总结

source_text: oscar making sure he got one goated overtake in before the end of june just so he can win another overtake of the month award
current_zh: Oscar在June临终前确保他被一个GODO入围,
suggested_zh: Oscar 赶在 6 月结束前又贡献了一次神级超车，只为再拿一次月度最佳超车。
notes: goated 意译为神级

source_text: zak brown on the possibility of max joining mclaren: "i'd be very surprised if lando or oscar went elsewhere. they're happy here, we're very happy with them. if for some reason someone slipped on a banana peel getting out of the tub then of course, max is a world champ"
current_zh: 如果Lando或Oscar去别的地方, 他们在这里很快乐 我们对他们很满意 如果因为某种原因有人滑倒 在香蕉皮上 从浴缸里出来,当然,最大是一个世界冠军"兄弟"
suggested_zh: Zak Brown 谈 Max 加入 McLaren 的可能性：“如果 Lando 或 Oscar 去别的地方，我会非常惊讶。他们在这里很开心，我们也很满意他们。如果某些极端意外发生，当然，Max 是世界冠军。”
notes: banana peel 比喻意外，不直译

source_text: mclaren right now working on the breaks of oscar's car (they were doing the same in lando's)
current_zh: McLaren现在正在研究 Oscar的车被撞断的问题(他们在Lando的车里也是这样)
suggested_zh: McLaren 现在正在处理 Oscar 赛车的刹车；Lando 那边也在做同样的事。
notes: 原文 breaks 疑似 brakes，按赛车语境处理

source_text: oscar, max and lewis during the national anthem!
current_zh: 奥斯卡 国歌时的花花公子

source_text: Q: Might you hope to use your tyres better and make up some places? "We'll have to see. I mean the Ferraris being in the top 3 is impressive. They didn't look amazing yesterday, today they've definitely made a step forward. I think in the race, they're generally quick in all the corners and not so much on the straights. So if that means they have more downforce then in this heat, that's only a good thing for them. We'll try our best obviously but I think it'll be a tough race and everyone pretty close on pace"
current_zh: 问:你是否希望更好地使用轮胎, "得相见. 我的意思是法拉利队在前3名是令人印象深刻的。 他们昨天看起来并不惊人,今天他们确实向前迈出了一步. 我认为在比赛中,它们一般在每一个角落都是快活的,而不是在直道上那么快. 因此,如果这意味着他们有 更多的降压, 那么在这个热度, 这只是一件好事 他们。 很明显我们会尽力的 但我觉得这比赛会很艰难 每个人都很接近"
suggested_zh: 问：你会期待更好地利用轮胎、追回一些位置吗？Oscar：“还得看情况。两台 Ferrari 都进了前三，这确实很强。他们昨天看起来没那么突出，但今天明显向前迈了一步。我觉得正赛里他们通常在弯道很快，直道没那么快。如果这意味着他们有更多下压力，那在这种高温下只会对他们有利。我们当然会尽力，但我觉得比赛会很艰难，大家的速度都很接近。”
notes: 长采访问答；Ferraris in the top 3 是两台 Ferrari 都进前三，不是包揽前三

source_text: Q: Ultimately were you caught out by what happened? "No, I was in front of it. Just not quick enough for us unfortunately. I think the whole weekend there's been half a tenth, at most, between the two of us. I feel like we're probably getting the most out of things. The last lap was a little bit messy in a few places but we didn't have enough to go and challenge George today. Little bit frustrating, it seemed like we were really competitive yesterday and even at the start of Q1, Q2 just missing out on that last little bit."
current_zh: 问:你最终是否为所难? "不,我在它前面。 但对我们来说还不够快 我想整个周末我们之间 最多有一半的时间 我觉得我们可能 得到的东西最多。 最后一圈在几个地方有点乱 但我们今天没有足够的时间去挑战乔治 似乎我们昨天真的很有竞争力, 甚至早在Q1,Q2开始时,
suggested_zh: 问：你最终是被当时的情况影响了吗？Oscar：“没有，我在它前面。不幸的是，我们就是不够快。整个周末我们两台车之间最多也就半个十分之一。我觉得我们大概已经把能拿到的都拿到了。最后一圈有几个地方有点乱，但今天我们没有足够速度去挑战 George。确实有点沮丧，昨天甚至 Q1、Q2 开始时我们看起来都很有竞争力，但最后就是差了那一点。”
notes: 长采访问答

source_text: oscar's thoughts on fp day: "it was a pretty good day. we are a step behind mercedes, but we expected it. it's been a productive day, we tried a lot of things. we had some homework to do on my side from spain and i feel like we've done a good job of that. it's been pretty good!"
current_zh: 奥斯卡在fp日的想法:"这是一个相当不错的一天. 我们比商场落后了一步 但我们预料到了 今天很有成果 我们尝试了很多 我们做了一些家庭作业 从斯潘,我觉得我们已经做了一个很好的工作。 已经很不错了!"
suggested_zh: Oscar 谈练习日：“今天相当不错。我们比 Mercedes 落后一步，但这是预料之中的。今天很有成效，我们尝试了很多东西。Spain 之后我这边有些功课要做，我觉得我们完成得很好。整体挺不错。”
notes: FP day 译为练习日
